title: boltonia diffusa var. interior
intro: Boltonia diffusa var. interior, also known as Swamp Boltonia or Prairie Dock, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its tall stems and white or pink flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Swamp Boltonia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
